verdict.label: Worth checking
verdict.headline: Rey Cortiço Lunch — 13:00
verdict.reason: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for lunch — 13:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide is fine, but Belgas can still work lower if the rest is better.

conversationalSummary.text: TODAY, Rey Cortiço around lunch (about 13:00) looks like the best option on paper, but I wouldn’t commit until I check the Surfline cams and MEO Beachcam first—consistency looks weak and the wind angle is a bit off for this spot. With the tide high and dropping, it might stay workable, just don’t expect it to feel super clean unless the banks line up. If the cams don’t look noticeably better than expected, I’d give it a miss.

photo.alt: Photo of Rey Cortiço surf spot

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Rey Cortiço looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 47 kJ, 11 s period, lully 16/100, and wind is the main risk.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; wind angle is poor for this spot.
best.shortExplanation: Rey Cortiço is worth a quick check for lunch — 13:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide is fine, but Belgas can still work lower if the rest is better.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a small window for Fun progression, Medium confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 33 kJ, 11 s period, lully 8/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small; 10-13s at high tide is softer but still workable on the reef shelves.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small.
ranked.shortExplanation: Lagide is worth a quick check for lunch — 13:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide helps a little, but it is not a perfect match.

ranked.explanation: Supertubos looks like a clean small window for Too soft, Medium confidence: 0-0.3 m, 20 kJ, 12 s period, lully 0/100, and good wind at 15 km/h.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort; 10-13s at mid tide is the prime barrel / wedge setup for Supertubos / Molhe Leste.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; Supertubos looks below your bodyboard fun size; SwellMap rating 1/10 Poor — caution.
ranked.shortExplanation: Supertubos is worth a quick check for early morning — 08:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  It looks too soft to make the drive worthwhile.  The wind should help keep it tidy.  The tide is lining up for a powerful wedge, so keep the comfort level in mind.
warnings: Supertubos looks below your bodyboard fun size

ranked.explanation: Cantinho da Baia looks like a small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 112 kJ, 11 s period, consistent 66/100, and wind is the main risk.  A forgiving sandy bay with lots of take-off points; this is best for easy wave count and cleaner faces when the north wind is bothering exposed beaches.  Watch: spot surf looks too small; wind angle is poor for this spot; 10-13s at low tide is fast and shallow in the sheltered bay; Cantinho da Baia looks below your bodyboard fun size.
ranked.shortExplanation: Cantinho da Baia is worth a quick check for evening — 17:00, but it is not a guaranteed session.  It looks too soft to make the drive worthwhile.  Wind is the main thing to watch.  The tide helps a bit, but the bay still needs enough push.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot
10-13s at low tide is fast and shallow in the sheltered bay
